overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a foggy grass field at night, approaching and passing a solitary campfire with trees lining the left side. The scene has a horror/survival game atmosphere with limited visibility due to dense fog and dynamic fire lighting.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass toward a distant campfire in the fog

entered.detail: small burning fire providing orange light in the foggy darkness
dark silhouetted trees lining the left side of the field
tall grass covering the ground throughout the field

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, foggy night in a grassy field. The camera moves forward through tall grass toward a solitary campfire burning in the distance. Trees form a dark silhouette along the left edge of the frame while dense fog limits visibility.

events.description: passing the campfire on the left side and continuing forward into deeper fog

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk past the campfire and proceeding deeper into the foggy field

entered.detail: faint silhouette of trees visible through the fog in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the campfire on the left and continues moving forward into the dense fog. The fire falls behind and out of view while the tree line on the left recedes into the distance. Visibility remains extremely limited as the terrain opens up into a darker, more isolated section of the field.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a dark, foggy field that transitions from the warmth of a distant fire to a state of total isolation. It begins by pushing through tall grass toward a solitary campfire burning in the distance, with dark silhouettes of trees lining the left edge of the frame. As the camera reaches the light, it passes the campfire on the left, causing the glow to fade behind and out of view. The scene then shifts into a deeper, more oppressive fog where the tree line recedes into the distance. Finally, the camera continues forward as the terrain opens up into a darker and more isolated section of the field with extremely limited visibility.
